route.name: Echo-Titus Circuit: Death Valley
route.region: Death Valley / Echo Canyon / Titus Canyon
route.description: Public GPX Death Valley loop with remote desert roads, canyon riding, long climbs, and severe heat/water logistics.
route.surfaceMix: Public GPX Death Valley loop with remote desert roads, canyon riding, long climbs, and severe heat/water logistics.
route.bestSeason: Cool season only; July heat blocks promotion.

difficultyProfile.surface: Public GPX Death Valley loop with remote desert roads, canyon riding, long climbs, and severe heat/water logistics.

resources.water: Water is scarce and must be planned exactly; July heat compounds the risk.
resources.food: Sparse services; carry food and verify all water/service points.
resources.camping: Death Valley camping/backcountry rules must be confirmed for any future attempt.
resources.toiletsShowers: Use mapped waypoints and land-manager pages; confirm current operation before departure.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest shops and exact hours during final trip refresh.
resources.longestGap: Measure from imported GPX and source POIs before ride-ready promotion.
resources.mosquitoes: Seasonal; check recent reports for camp and water-adjacent sections.
